mapper.sql: id, name, level, address, phone, intro, image, province, city, department_count, doctor_count, follow_count, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_hospital order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_hospital set name = #{et.name}, level = #{et.level}, address = #{et.address}, phone = #{et.phone}, intro = #{et.intro}, image = #{et.image}, province = #{et.province}, city = #{et.city}, department_count = #{et.departmentCount}, doctor_count = #{et.doctorCount}, follow_count = #{et.followCount}, status = #{et.status}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
